meanings.definition: an electronic device that doubles the voltage or the frequency of an input signal
having more than one decidedly dissimilar aspects or qualities; ; - R.W.Emerson; -Frederick Harrison
examples: a double (or dual) role for an actor
the office of a clergyman is twofold; public preaching and private influence
every episode has its double and treble meaning

meanings.definition: consisting of or involving two parts or components usually in pairs
examples: an egg with a double yolk
dual controls for pilot and copilot
duple (or double) time consists of two (or a multiple of two) beats to a measure

meanings.definition: used of flowers having more than the usual number of petals in crowded or overlapping arrangements
examples: double chrysanthemums have many rows of petals and are usually spherical or hemispherical

meanings.definition: used of homologous chromosomes associated in pairs in synapsis
having two meanings with intent to deceive
